title: Thiocarbamates Group - Canada.ca
content:
## Thiocarbamates Group
- Thiocarbamates Group
These substances were identified for action under the third phase of Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
Proposed  order and RIAS
Public comment on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Public comments on the proposed risk management approach
Proposed risk management approach
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Thiocarbamates Group
Thioperoxydicarbonic diamide ([(H 2 N)C(S)] 2 S 2 ), tetramethyl-
Meets one or more of the criteria
Refer to proposed risk management approach
Piperidine, 1,1'-(tetrathiodicarbonothioyl)bis-
None planned at this time
Publication  in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol.  156, No. 41 of the  proposed order adding TMTD  to Schedule 1 to the Canadian Environmental  Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA 1999) and start of a 60-day public comment period.
Publication in Canada Gazette , Part I, Vol. 156, No. 30 of a notice of intent to amend the Domestic Substances List to apply the Significant New Activity provisions of CEPA 1999 to TMTD and start of 60-day public comment period.
Publication of the Final Screening Assessment for the Thiocarbamates Group. The Proposed Risk Management Approach for TMTD was also published for a 60-day public comment period. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I, Vol. 155, No. 2 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the Draft Screening Assessment for the Thiocarbamates Group (including follow-up activities for TMTD) and the Risk Management Scope for TMTD . The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 152, No. 5 .
